deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1 2026. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K, est value $266K.
deals.next: Chris pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc, build analysis sheet, lock template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land acreage development opportunity. Title defect: incomplete legal description on Deed 20100079485. Isaac Linares mobile home development concept (~$150K offer) stalled. Sisters ended listing May 28. Signs picked up.
deals.next: Deal closed. Monitor for future referral opportunities.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Chris walking away. Signs picked up last week.
Price adjustment needed. Isaac development interest and title defect did not result in path forward.
Isaac Linares development discussion: mobile homes, half units for veterans, half for profit, ~$150K offer.
Showing occurred. Sisters excited about Isaac development interest.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3/2 1994 home, 2,972 sqft, pool, outdoor kitchen. VA loan $493K payoff. Underwater $93K-$143K. Listed $528,999 for 208 DOM. Double-carrying costs. Sellers moving back in to make repairs, plan to relist later.
deals.next: Terminated May 29. Relationship intact. Monitor for future listing opportunity when repairs complete.

logs.m: Mutual termination. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist after work complete.
Honest call with sellers. Chandler was laid off. Short sale discussed as option. Sellers leaning toward moving back in.
Full market analysis complete. Underwater analysis presented. Three paths outlined.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3/2.5 1,886 sqft 2011 Laura Heights PUD. List $259,900 May 14. Sellers moving to NC second week June (high urgency). Foundation crack flagged. Loan payoff discrepancy verify. Second-look buyers favorite property. Four showings completed.
deals.next: Confirm showing time today May 30. Follow up second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offer. Get showing feedback.

logs.m: Second-look buyers back for second showing, their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled May 30.
4th showing scheduled 1:30pm. Another agent asked about backup offer option.
Investor cash offer $176K discussed. Keeping conversation open with sellers.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Cultural concern about street direction noted by agent.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152K. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Cleared and funded Apr 26. Officially closed Apr 27 2026.
deals.next: Deliver joy gift basket + rug + trolley. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel lunch/coffee. Thank Michael notary and UPS Store staff. Personal thank you Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Confirmed complete May 9.
Cleared and funded.
Lien release picked up. Fernando Castillo signed. Delivered to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3/2 1,809 sqft 4.05 acres Frio County. Payoff $257K Feb 2026. CMA pulled May 15. Recommended list $295K net proceeds ~$14.7K. Divorce situation. VA loan purchase assistance prior.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17. CMA pulled, thin market 3 comps in 10 miles. Net sheet built.
Prior clients. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Damage after bank possession liability shift. HouzzPro Matt Toney work started May 9. Floor demo complete drywall cut. Utilities: Medina Electric 866-632-3532, EMCSUD 830-709-3879.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD confirm meter status. Replace camera batteries on site. Police reports still pending. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Police reports still pending. Utilities not responding. Camera needs batteries. Listing agreement still needed to bank.
Visited property. Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly.
Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. Transformer number and utility setup in progress.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres A-735 hunting property. Contract $113K with Espinoza buyers. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier buyer agent. Alyssa Castillo Chicago Title escrow officer.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email correct. Follow up on backup offer interest.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza family, buyer agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent. EMD not received yet.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117.5K. Exclusions locked: Conex contents, camper, feeders.
Clearing complete. Steve sent photos. Property ready to market.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Moving faster than planned. 916 Marriott failed foundation check. Pivoting to new construction no HOA. Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal too much. Still actively searching. Zach Schaphorst pre-approved ~$122K. Erik Williams backup lender.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search. Identify builder options no HOA. Follow up with Zach on approval status. Connect with builders.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1700/month rent. Military retirement plus two daughters disability checks co-borrowers. Between jobs but retirement qualifies. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan zero down likely eligible. Nextdoor connection High Country neighborhood.
leads.next: Call today priority. Connect with VA-approved lender. Confirm timeline, budget, target area. Start property search Bold Trail.

leads.title: Brandon Moran - Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon mother. Budget $50K down target ~$1000/month payment. New construction, no HOA preference. Builder rate buydowns angle significant. Not locked to Grace Gardens. Buyer rep signed May 7. MI Homes option from Frank pending review.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep signed by Milagros. Pull new construction options all builders area. Builder rate scenarios at 5.6%-1.9%. Follow up Brandon confirm mom timeline.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection grief to healing plants story. Connected through garden share group. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential trust-based long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share healing story. Keep nurturing no rush on real estate.

leads.title: Isaac Linares Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor interested likely Schertz area. Buy box unknown. Full intake pending. Multiple deals in progress: Borregas development concept, 10023 Mill Path referral, 301 W Saxet wholesale, partnership with Adam.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box budget timeline strategy. Add to Bold Trail. Connect on active deals if match.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife active military VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting San Antonio area. Natural relationship met on-site.
leads.next: Get Bryceus contact info phone/email. Qualify wife VA eligibility confirm branch. Connect with VA lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Fixer Buyer
leads.detail: Jerome downline agent Schertz/Cibolo. Buyer interested property needing work. Unique situation details pending. May 11 catch up meeting scheduled.
leads.next: Follow up Jerome get full buyer details. Understand financing type work needed price range. Identify matching inventory fixer/REO/estate.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat neighbor mentioned son inherited home after parent passed. Deceased was avid gardener hung plants on fence. Son is new owner not yet contacted. Probate/inherited property lead.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat. Sons name and contact info. Reach out lead with garden angle honor previous owners gardening love. Assess keep/rent/sell.

priorities.title: Mill Path 10023 - Second Look Buyers
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers came back for second showing. It is their favorite property. They love floorplan and maintenance. Walk-in closet slightly small noted. Rescheduled showing May 30 time TBD.

followUps.text: Confirm showing time with agent today
Follow up after May 30 showing for feedback and movement
Offer guidance if buyers ready to move forward

priorities.notes: Military retirement income plus daughters disability co-borrowers. Paying $1700/mo rent motivated. VA zero down eligible. Overdue since Apr 30 follow-up. Do not let slip again.
